# PyRocky

PyRocky is a Python client for Ansys Rocky. It uses Pyro5 and Rocky PrePost Scripting API
to send remote commands to Ansys Rocky

## Development Environment

To create the virtual environment, run:

    python -m pip install --upgrade pip
    pip install -e .

To run tests:

    pytest tests

## Pull Requests

- Use GitHub CLI to manager pull requests
- Title Pull Requests using Conventional Commits standards (feat, maint, etc)
